phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è Piazza dei Cavalieri, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH PYAH-tzah day kah-vah-lyeh-REE-eh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un bar aperto qui vicino, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon BAHRR ah-PER-toh kwee vee-CHEE-noh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Yes, at the corner of the street.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso usare il bagno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh oo-ZAH-reh eel BAH-nyoh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask what Borgo Stretto is known for
phrases.text_local: Scusi, per cosa è famoso il Borgo Stretto?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, per KOH-zah eh fah-MOH-zoh eel BOR-goh STRET-toh?
phrases.cultural_note: Borgo Stretto is Pisa's elegant medieval arcade street, lined with cafés, pastry shops and boutiques.

responses.english: For its medieval arcades and historic pastry shops.
responses.phonetic: per ee por-TEE-chee meh-dee-eh-VAH-lee eh leh pah-stee-cheh-REE-eh STOH-ree-keh.
responses.local: Per i portici medievali e le pasticcerie storiche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy a traditional ricciarelli biscuit
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si comprano i ricciarelli o i cantuccini tipici?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see KOM-prah-noh ee ree-chah-REL-lee oh ee kan-toot-CHEE-nee TEE-pee-chee?

responses.english: At Salza or at the Salza pastry shop on Borgo Stretto.
responses.phonetic: dah SAL-tsah oh al pah-stee-cheh-REE-ah feh-deh-REE-koh SAL-tsah, een BOR-goh STRET-toh.
responses.local: Da Salza o al Pasticceria Federico Salza, in Borgo Stretto.
